title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Find My Device location permission flow fails when user initially denies then grants "While Using the App" permission
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with a headset connected.
2. From the Home screen, tap the main menu (hamburger icon).
4. When the location permission popup appears, tap "Don't Allow".
5. Tap "Enable Now" on the Find My Device screen.
6. When the system location permission dialog appears, select "While Using the App" to grant permission.
7. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: The location permission popup appears at step 3. After tapping "Don't Allow", the Find My Device screen shows an "Enable Now" button. After tapping "Enable Now", the system permission dialog appears. After granting "While Using the App" permission and returning to the app, the Find My Device screen opens without any permission window.
